description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe featuring a glossy black upper with swirling white patterns and a prominent purple stripe running along the side. The shoe has a thick, semi-translucent gray sole with visible tread details, providing both style and functionality. The upper material appears to be synthetic or patent leather, giving it a shiny, reflective finish. The lacing system is standard criss-cross, with black laces threading through reinforced eyelets. The shoe's overall design is modern and bold, making it suitable for urban environments and streetwear fashion. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: Glossy black high-top shoe with swirling white patterns, a purple side stripe, and a thick gray sole. Modern, bold, and suitable for urban streetwear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the purple stripe, swirling white patterns, and the full profile of the thick gray sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the toe box, lacing system, and the shoe's width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the purple stripe and pattern details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel, back of the sole, and the continuation of the purple stripe.
